plain_english_meaning: The kind of source-detail row. This tells the engine how to read the row.
engine_rule: Required for every row. Primary values: member, member_alias, role_history, offer, business_event, pc_entry, sp_entry, reward_obligation, pool_entry, cashout_event, qualification_window, qualification_status. Accepted aliases also include members, member_aliases, alias, member_role, offers, business_events, event, pc_entries, pc_ledger, sp_entries, sp_ledger, reward_obligations, reward, pool_entries, pool, cashout_events, cashout, qualification_windows, qualification_status_history.

plain_english_meaning: The batch ID for this snapshot file.
engine_rule: Optional per row, but if filled, every row in the same CSV must use the same snapshot_id. If all rows leave it blank, the engine uses a default ID.

plain_english_meaning: The internal stable member ID used by the simulator.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=member. Leave blank for other record types.

plain_english_meaning: Human-readable member name.
engine_rule: Optional. Used only when record_type=member.

plain_english_meaning: Member group or cohort label.
engine_rule: Optional. Stored as member metadata and used as group_key when monthly rows are derived.

plain_english_meaning: The first month the member joined. Use YYYY-MM format.
engine_rule: Recommended for record_type=member. The engine can import without it, but leaving it blank weakens join-period history.

plain_english_meaning: Reference to a member stable_key already defined in a member row.
used_by_record_type: member_alias; role_history; pc_entry; sp_entry; reward_obligation; cashout_event; qualification_window; qualification_status
engine_rule: Required for these record types: member_alias, role_history, pc_entry, sp_entry, reward_obligation, cashout_event, qualification_window, qualification_status. The value must match a member stable_key. Leave blank on member rows because member rows use stable_key instead.

plain_english_meaning: The source business system where the data came from.
engine_rule: Required for member_alias, offer, and business_event rows. Optional for role_history. Optional on member rows, but if source_system and alias_key are filled on a member row, the engine automatically creates the alias behind the scenes. Accepted values: BGC, IBLOOMING, I-BLOOMING, I_BLOOMING.

plain_english_meaning: The member ID in the original source system.
engine_rule: Required for member_alias. Optional on member rows, but recommended so the engine can create the source-system alias without a separate member_alias row.

plain_english_meaning: The type of source-system alias.
engine_rule: Optional for member and member_alias rows. If blank while creating an alias, the engine defaults it to member_id.

plain_english_meaning: Confidence that the alias belongs to this member.
engine_rule: Optional for member and member_alias rows. If filled, it must be a number from 0 to 1.

plain_english_meaning: The category of member role or status.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=role_history. Accepted values: AFFILIATE_LEVEL, CP_STATUS, EXECUTIVE_CP_STATUS, WEC_STATUS, CROSS_APP_STATUS.

plain_english_meaning: The actual role/status value.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=role_history.

plain_english_meaning: The date this role/status starts.
engine_rule: Required for role_history and qualification_status. Date or ISO date-time accepted.

plain_english_meaning: The date this role/status ends.
engine_rule: Optional. Leave blank if the role/status is still active.

plain_english_meaning: Reference to the event_ref that caused or supports this row.
used_by_record_type: role_history; pc_entry; sp_entry; reward_obligation; pool_entry; cashout_event; qualification_window; qualification_status
engine_rule: Optional, but if filled it must match an existing business_event.event_ref in the same CSV. Recommended for audit trail.

plain_english_meaning: Unique code for the product, package, or offer.
engine_rule: Required for offer rows. Optional for business_event rows.

plain_english_meaning: The category of offer.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=offer. Accepted values: BGC_AFFILIATE_JOIN, BGC_AFFILIATE_UPGRADE, BGC_PHYSICAL_PRODUCT, IB_CP_DIGITAL_PRODUCT, IB_GIM_PRODUCT, IB_IMATRIX_PRODUCT.

plain_english_meaning: Human-readable offer name.
engine_rule: Optional for offer. If blank, the engine uses offer_code as the label.

plain_english_meaning: The offer price in USD.
engine_rule: Optional for offer. If filled, it must be a non-negative number.

plain_english_meaning: Simple PC grant value for an offer.
engine_rule: Optional for offer. If filled, the engine stores it as pc_grant_rule.pc_grant.

plain_english_meaning: Simple SP accrual value for an offer.
engine_rule: Optional for offer. If filled, the engine stores it as lts_generation_rule.sp_accrual.

plain_english_meaning: Advanced JSON object for PC grant rules.
engine_rule: Optional advanced field for offer. If filled, it must be a JSON object and overrides the simple pc_grant field.

plain_english_meaning: Advanced JSON object for SP/LTS generation rules.
engine_rule: Optional advanced field for offer. If filled, it must be a JSON object and overrides the simple sp_accrual field.

plain_english_meaning: Reference name for the business rule behind the offer reward.
engine_rule: Optional for offer.

plain_english_meaning: Unique ID for a business event.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=business_event. Other rows can point to this using source_event_ref.

plain_english_meaning: The kind of event that happened.
engine_rule: For business_event rows, accepted values: AFFILIATE_JOINED, AFFILIATE_UPGRADED, PHYSICAL_PRODUCT_PURCHASED, CP_PRODUCT_SOLD, GIM_SIGNUP_COMPLETED, IMATRIX_PURCHASE_COMPLETED, REWARD_ACCRUED, POOL_FUNDED, POOL_DISTRIBUTED, QUALIFICATION_WINDOW_OPENED, QUALIFICATION_ACHIEVED, CASHOUT_REQUESTED, CASHOUT_APPROVED, CASHOUT_PAID. For cashout_event rows, accepted values: REQUESTED, APPROVED, PAID, REJECTED.

plain_english_meaning: The date the event happened.
engine_rule: Required for business_event and cashout_event. Date or ISO date-time accepted.

plain_english_meaning: The month where this row should count in simulation. Use YYYY-MM format.
used_by_record_type: business_event; pc_entry; sp_entry; reward_obligation; pool_entry; cashout_event
engine_rule: Required for business_event, pc_entry, sp_entry, reward_obligation, pool_entry, and cashout_event.

plain_english_meaning: The member who performed the action.
engine_rule: Optional for business_event. If filled, it must match a member stable_key.

plain_english_meaning: The member who received the benefit or reward.
engine_rule: Optional for business_event. If filled, it must match a member stable_key.

plain_english_meaning: Another member related to the event.
engine_rule: Optional for business_event. If filled, it must match a member stable_key.

plain_english_meaning: Number of units in the event.
engine_rule: Optional for business_event. If filled, it must be a non-negative number.

plain_english_meaning: Generic amount for business events, rewards, and pool rows.
engine_rule: Required for reward_obligation and pool_entry. Optional for business_event.

plain_english_meaning: Unit for amount.
engine_rule: Required for reward_obligation and pool_entry. Optional for business_event, but recommended when business_event.amount is filled. Accepted values: USD, PC, SP, COUNT, SHARE.

plain_english_meaning: Company revenue recognized from the event.
engine_rule: Optional for business_event, but recommended for revenue events because it supports cashflow and treasury metrics.

plain_english_meaning: Gross margin recognized from the event.
engine_rule: Optional for business_event.

plain_english_meaning: New fiat cash collected by this event.
engine_rule: Recommended for business_event. Use 0 when the product was paid only with PC or ALPHA.

plain_english_meaning: USD value of PC, ALPHA, or other internal credit spent.
engine_rule: Recommended for product purchases paid with PC/ALPHA. This is internal ecosystem usage, not new fiat cash.

plain_english_meaning: How the transaction was paid.
engine_rule: Recommended when cash_in_usd or internal_credit_spent_usd is used. Accepted values: FIAT, PC, ALPHA, MIXED.

plain_english_meaning: The ledger movement type.
engine_rule: Required for pc_entry, sp_entry, and pool_entry. PC values: GRANT, SPEND, ADJUSTMENT. SP values: ACCRUAL, DISTRIBUTION, ADJUSTMENT. Pool values: FUNDING, DISTRIBUTION, ALLOCATION, ADJUSTMENT.

plain_english_meaning: The PC amount for a PC ledger row.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=pc_entry.

plain_english_meaning: The SP amount for an SP ledger row.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=sp_entry.

plain_english_meaning: USD value of internal use or sink spend.
engine_rule: Optional for pc_entry. Recommended when entry_type=SPEND. If blank on a SPEND row, the engine estimates sink spend as amount_pc / 100.

plain_english_meaning: The reward source or reward rule code.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=reward_obligation. Accepted values: BGC_RR, BGC_GR, BGC_MIRACLE_CASH, BGC_GPSP, BGC_WEC_POOL, IB_LR, IB_MIRACLE_CASH, IB_CPR, IB_GRR, IB_IRR, IB_GPS, IB_GMP, IB_GEC.

plain_english_meaning: How often the reward or pool distributes.
engine_rule: Required for reward_obligation and pool_entry. Accepted values: EVENT_BASED, MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, SEMIANNUAL, YEARLY, ADHOC.

plain_english_meaning: Current status of the reward obligation.
engine_rule: Optional for reward_obligation. If blank, the engine defaults it to ACCRUED. Accepted values: ACCRUED, ELIGIBLE, DISTRIBUTED, CANCELLED.

plain_english_meaning: The source join level used to calculate BGC reward rows.
engine_rule: Required for BGC_RR rows and BGC_GR rows so strict validation can verify reward math.

plain_english_meaning: Reward tier number used by selected reward formulas.
engine_rule: Required for BGC_GR rows and iBlooming GRR/IRR rows that need tier-specific math. Optional otherwise.

plain_english_meaning: iMatrix plan code used by IB_IRR reward math.
engine_rule: Required for IB_IRR rows. Optional otherwise.

plain_english_meaning: Reference to the eligibility snapshot used for this reward or pool row.
engine_rule: Optional for reward_obligation and pool_entry.

plain_english_meaning: The pool being funded or distributed.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=pool_entry. Accepted values: BGC_GPSP_MONTHLY_POOL, BGC_WEC_QUARTERLY_POOL, IB_GPS_SEMIANNUAL_POOL, IB_WEC_USER_MONTHLY_POOL, IB_GMP_MONTHLY_POOL, IB_GEC_INTERNAL_POOL.

plain_english_meaning: The member receiving a pool distribution.
engine_rule: Required when record_type=pool_entry and entry_type=DISTRIBUTION. Leave blank for pool funding rows.

plain_english_meaning: The recipient share count for pool distribution.
engine_rule: Optional for pool_entry. Recommended for distribution rows when pool share math matters.

plain_english_meaning: Total recipient count for the pool distribution snapshot.
engine_rule: Optional for pool_entry. Used only as pool metadata.

plain_english_meaning: Total share count for the pool distribution snapshot.
engine_rule: Optional for pool_entry. Used only as pool metadata. If blank, the engine can use share_count for the recipient row.

plain_english_meaning: Cash-out amount in USD. This is the cash-out value used by the engine.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=cashout_event. Leave blank for non-cash-out rows.

plain_english_meaning: Cash-out fee in USD.
engine_rule: Optional for cashout_event. Recommended to fill 0 when there is no fee.

plain_english_meaning: The source system for the cash-out.
engine_rule: Optional for cashout_event. If blank, the engine tries to infer it from source_event_ref or member history, then defaults to BGC.

plain_english_meaning: Label used to group cash-out breakdowns.
engine_rule: Optional for cashout_event. If blank, the engine uses CASHOUT.

plain_english_meaning: Optional cash-out scenario label.
engine_rule: Optional for cashout_event. Stored as metadata for analysis.

plain_english_meaning: Optional cash-out policy group label.
engine_rule: Optional for cashout_event. Stored as metadata for analysis.

plain_english_meaning: The qualification program or rule type.
engine_rule: Required for qualification_window and qualification_status. Accepted values: WEC_60_DAY, CPR_YEAR_1, CPR_YEAR_2, EXECUTIVE_CP_APPOINTMENT, POOL_RECIPIENT_SNAPSHOT.

plain_english_meaning: Unique ID for a qualification window.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=qualification_window.

plain_english_meaning: The date a qualification window starts.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=qualification_window. Date or ISO date-time accepted.

plain_english_meaning: The date a qualification window ends.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=qualification_window. Date or ISO date-time accepted.

plain_english_meaning: The target amount required for qualification.
engine_rule: Optional for qualification_window. If filled, it must be a non-negative number.

plain_english_meaning: The unit of the qualification target.
engine_rule: Optional for qualification_window, but recommended when threshold_amount is filled. Accepted values: USD, PC, SP, COUNT, SHARE.

plain_english_meaning: The qualification status value.
engine_rule: Required only when record_type=qualification_status. Accepted values: OPEN, ELIGIBLE, ACHIEVED, ACTIVE, EXPIRED, CANCELLED.

plain_english_meaning: Reference to the qualification window_key.
engine_rule: Optional for qualification_status, but recommended. If filled, it must match a qualification_window.window_key for the same member and qualification_type.

plain_english_meaning: Advanced JSON metadata merged into the generated source-detail record.
engine_rule: Optional for any row. If filled, it must be a JSON object.
